3301650.name: Superstellar
3301650.description:
Superstellar offers a fresh take on the survivor genre with its advanced stat synergies, extensive build diversity and crucial player choice. Roam endless space and engage in frantic combat with responsive, racing-like movement. Complete missions and milestones to unlock new spaceships, each equipped with new weapons and exclusive upgrade choices. Choose your upgrades wisely and fight to stay alive as long as possible against hordes of pesky enemies! Runs typically last about 20 minutes, but skilled players might endure a bit longer.

How long can you survive?

⚔️ Gameplay & Combat

  • Endless battles – Survive as long as possible in a randomly generated space environment.

  • Massive enemy waves – Face over 500 enemies at once!

  • Enemy territories – Each with unique enemies, events and challenges.

  • Dynamic events - Adapt to hazards like solar flares, asteroid belts, darkness, and radiation!

  • All out war – A randomized brutal mode that combines all enemy territories into one.

🚀 Ships & Classes

  • 🌀 Orion – Energy and electricity-based, specializing in electrocution.

  • 🔥 Phoenix – Fire-based, focused on igniting and burning enemies.

  • ❄️ Titan – Ice and summoner-based, capable of chilling, freezing, and shattering foes.

Each ship boasts a game-changing ultimate ability aswell, and comes in light, medium, and heavy armored variants with different stats and ability enhancements.

🔧 Customization & Build Diversity

  • 36 weapons – Each with different rarity tiers, effects, and playstyles.

  • 75 unique passives – Alter stats, gain powerful bonuses, and create new synergies.

  • 24 player stats – Designed for deep interactions, ensuring every stat matters.

  • Randomized modifiers – Adapt and optimize your build with every level.

📈 Progression & Features

  • Missions & milestones – Unlock new territories, ships, weapons, and upgrades.

  • Difficulty progression – Each unlocked territory increases in challenge.

  • Steam achievements – Conquer challenges and prove your mastery.

  • High scores – Set new records!

  • Gamepad support – Seamless gamepad support, fully optimized for controller play.

Credits:

Music in gameplay teaser by Karl Casey @ White Bat Audio.
